ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Carol Mayeda appeared via zoom for Jordan Goldstein (petitioner).

Ms. Mayeda stated that the beneficiaries are all residing in Japan. The Court take this matter under submission with the intent to grant but not approving some of her acts.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
